summary: Checked 32 claims against the codebase on phase/3.6-bugfix. 30 confirmed exactly. 2 minor inaccuracies: one off-by-one line range and one wrong filename in a 'Files to read' hint. No critical mirages — every cited file/function/symbol exists at the cited location, and the three negative claims (ResetReason / engineReady / inference-reset don't yet exist) are all true.

findings.reality: There is no file named `ConfigKeys.kt`. `ConfigKeys` is an `object` declared inside `core-runtime/src/main/kotlin/app/sanctum/machina/core/data/Config.kt` (Config.kt:41 defines `val MAX_TOKENS = ConfigKey("max_tokens", "Max tokens")`). The neighbour file is `ConfigValue.kt`.
findings.fix: Replace `ConfigKeys.kt` with `Config.kt` in the Task 4 file-list.

findings.claim: tech-spec § Solution states `LIGHT_FIELD_LABELS` is at `ChatViewModel.kt:1518`; later acceptance criteria reference `LIGHT_FIELD_LABELS 1514-1518`
findings.reality: `LIGHT_FIELD_LABELS` is declared at `ChatViewModel.kt:1514-1519` (closing `)` is on line 1519). The MAX_TOKENS entry inside it is on line 1518 (so the line-1518 reference for MAX_TOKENS is correct). The 1514-1518 range is off-by-one for the closing bracket.
findings.source: tech-spec.md line 20 (says 1518), implicit ranges in solution/decisions
findings.fix: Cosmetic; cite line range as 1514-1519 if a range is needed. The MAX_TOKENS-specific reference is fine.
